name: mnox-ai
description: Matt Noxon's curated Claude Code skills and utilities for building, auditing, and refactoring software and AI systems. Install any skill on its own, grab everything with all-skills, or pull a standalone utility.

plugins.name: aio
plugins.description: Agentic Implementation Optimizer — audit, build, or extend agentic AI implementations for reliability, cost, and architecture.

plugins.name: curriculum
plugins.description: Generate an adaptive learning curriculum for any topic, with an append-only assessment loop that tunes future modules to the learner.

plugins.name: strangler-fig
plugins.description: Clean-room legacy reimplementation — distill to requirements, rebuild greenfield behind a context firewall, verify parity, optionally cut over.

plugins.name: schema-review
plugins.description: Review database schemas and in-code data structures for correctness, integrity, performance, scalability, and design quality.

plugins.name: compliance-review
plugins.description: Audit a repo, ADR/PRD, IaC, or live cloud state against SOC 2, HIPAA, or PCI-DSS with structured, evidence-backed findings.

plugins.name: util-review
plugins.description: Review Claude Code skills, hooks, CLAUDE.md, and workflow configs for design flaws, unclosed loops, stale references, and risks.

plugins.name: debut
plugins.description: Pre-public open-source readiness audit — secrets/PII, licensing, community-health files, tests/CI, deps — scored with fix commands.

plugins.name: diagnose-queries
plugins.description: Diagnose slow database queries across Postgres, the ORM layer (N+1), and Snowflake/dbt — five modes from known-query analysis to live-incident triage, ending in a root-caused, verified fix.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Autonomous-fix loop driver — drains a bucket of work-unit files one at a time, spawning an Opus Worker to implement each in an isolated git worktree and an independent Opus Integrator to review it, strictly serial and never pushing to a remote.

plugins.name: all-skills
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that installs every mnox-ai skill at once.

plugins.name: session-tracker
plugins.description: Local MCP server that tracks your Claude Code / Cursor / Codex agent sessions — list, search, label, and inspect changes across every session. Lexical (FTS5) search by default; semantic search is opt-in. Requires Bun.
